name: syslog-mcp
description: Homelab syslog receiver plus MCP server for searching, tailing, and correlating logs across hosts. Full-text search with FTS5, event correlation across time windows, and error summaries.

syslog_mcp_url.title: Syslog MCP URL
syslog_mcp_url.description: Base URL of the syslog-mcp server (e.g. http://localhost:3100)

syslog_mcp_token.title: MCP Server Bearer Token
syslog_mcp_token.description: Bearer token for authenticating MCP requests. Must match SYSLOG_MCP_TOKEN in .env. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
